summary: The user sought assistance in analyzing their Instagram engagement rates and improving their social media performance, particularly after noticing an increase in followers due to posts about a recent Yosemite hiking trip. They discussed strategies for collaboration with influencers and considered running a giveaway on TikTok to further boost engagement and attract new followers.
facts: The user has around 200 followers on Instagram and averaged 50 likes and 10 comments on their most popular Yosemite post. The user has been gaining approximately 10 new followers per week on Instagram. The user is considering collaborating with influencers in the beauty and outdoor niches on TikTok. The user has reached out to a few influencers on Instagram and Twitter for potential collaboration opportunities. The user is planning a "Summer Skincare Essentials" giveaway, partnering with beauty influencers to give away a skincare set and outdoor gear. Participants in the giveaway will need to follow the user's account, like the giveaway post, and tag three friends. The user has had recent success with a skincare routine video on TikTok.
